svg.title: DNS Server Lookup Flowchart
svg.desc: Step-by-step flowchart showing how a DNS query is resolved, from browser cache through recursive resolver, root nameserver, TLD nameserver, and authoritative nameserver.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a user types a URL into the browser?')
sendPrompt('What is the browser DNS cache?')
sendPrompt('What happens when there is a DNS cache hit?')
sendPrompt('What is the hosts file and OS DNS cache?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the OS resolves the DNS entry?')
sendPrompt('What is a recursive DNS resolver and who runs it?')
sendPrompt('What is a resolver cache hit?')
sendPrompt('What is a DNS root nameserver?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the IP address is returned?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the browser gets the IP address?')

svg.text: Click any step to learn more
